title: But Muzeyyen That's the Deepest Desire
original_title: Fakat Müzeyyen Bu Derin Bir Tutku
overview: Arif, who is trying to write his first book, believes that life contains many unanswerable questions, especially about women and relationships. But when Müzeyyen appears unexpectedly, everything he has ever known or tried to learn is suddenly turned upside down.
